## Project completion

To complete the template, please ensure that:
- All questions highlighted in **red** have been answered.
- There are no empty answer fields.
- No answer boxes contain accidental spaces. If a space was entered by mistake and you see a "Clear answer" option appear underneath, click it to remove the space.

## Document Publication

Once completed, you need to publish your document. If you want to generate a nanopublication, follow these steps:
- Go to Documents.
- Click on **New Document**.
- Select the **Nanopublication Template**.
- Click **Create**.
- Click the three dots icon on the right, then select **Submit to the Nanopub Server**.

If you encounter any errors in this process, look at this guide.
